target: 9. Suspicious and Distrustful
Mio, don't go.
Shin-chan…?

I understand how much you want to trust Alan.
But I…
I don't want anyone I can't be certain is the real person near Mio.

Go ahead, Alan.
I'll catch up with Mio later.
…I see.
Sorry…

It's fine, I don't mind being doubted.
Just…

Promise me both of you will be safe.
That's all I ask.
Dad…
Yeah, I promise.
Then I'll see you later.
Yeah…
Take care, Alan.

I'm sorry, Mio.
I just couldn't believe that was the real Alan.

If what that Alan said was true,
and there really was a burglar who broke into Kofune
and a shadow that attacked them…

It's suspicious that they ignored the Alan at the store
and just left.
If they were looking for us, they could just call either my phone or Mio's.

I didn't get any calls from Alan.
What about you, Mio?
Me too…it doesn't make sense.

…If there's even the slightest doubt,
I won't consider them the real thing.
If I'm wrong…
Yeah, in that case I'll apologize to everyone who I doubted.
If that's the case, I'll check too.

I mean, could it really be Shin-chan who's a shadow?
That's not possible, right?
Me…a shadow?

I'm sorry…
I'm saying such terrible things.

Even after being helped so much,
and being given kind words…

But if that dad might be a shadow,
I don't know what to believe anymore.
Right now, the Shin-chan in front of me…

He's not a shadow, right?
I can trust him, right?

Yeah, you can trust him.
I'm the real Shinpei Ajiro.

Yeah…I trust you.
Sorry, Shin-chan.

Don't apologize.
Come on, let's go to the harbor.

Yeah, let's go.
It'd be good to meet Tokiko and the others.

(While heading to the harbor, I'll try to organize my thoughts.
I need to think about the worst case scenario too)

(I don't want to imagine it, but
if something happened to Sou, Tokiko, and even…
Mio…)
(If that happens, I'll have no choice but to try 'that')

(I don't have any proof it'll work.
But…)

(If I can't protect anything
and end up in despair, then
there's nothing left but 'that')

(Well, if things have gotten this bad,
I'm probably in serious danger too)
(…No matter what, I'll protect Mio)

Shin-chan?
You're thinking about something?

…Yeah.
I'm just thinking about what to do next.
Don't you ever think about me?
Huh? What?

N-nothing! It's nothing!
Let's hurry!
If we miss the ferry, it'll be all over!

Wait! Hold on!
Mio, don't go!
